subcodes.first_line: Divine verses have been sent down in such manner that the Book of the world and all who wield the pen stand powerless and incapable of reckoning them, and every soul that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آیات الهیه بشانی نازل که کتاب عالم و صاحبان قلم از احصای آن عاجز و قاصر و هر نفسیکه
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @modes; manner; speed; size of divine revelation
